hero.title: Multilingual AI Quality, Localization & Interpretation
hero.subtitle: Independent specialist based in Trondheim, Norway. Delivering precision AI data operations, RLHF training, and cross-border language services for Nordic and international markets.

about.title: Building Trust Through Precision
about.description: As an independent multilingual specialist based in Trondheim, Norway, I combine deep linguistic expertise with hands-on AI technology experience. Every project receives focused attention, clear communication, and deliverables that meet the highest professional standards. All work is handled with strict confidentiality.

nordic.label: Nordic AI Specialization
nordic.title: Why Nordic AI Localization Matters
nordic.description: AI products that work well in English often fail in Nordic markets. Translation alone is not enough—Nordic users expect culturally adapted interfaces, appropriate tone, and locally relevant content.
nordic.intro: As a multilingual specialist with deep Nordic roots and hands-on AI experience, I help organizations adapt their AI products for Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish users in ways that global providers cannot.
points: Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish are distinct languages with different terminology, formality norms, and user expectations
AI tone and phrasing that works in English can feel awkward, too informal, or even untrustworthy in Nordic contexts
Smaller language markets require human oversight—automated translation introduces errors that erode user trust
Nordic users have high expectations for quality and accuracy, especially in professional and public-sector contexts

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Answers to questions I frequently receive from prospective clients.

whatIsRlhf.question: What is RLHF and why does it matter for AI quality?
whatIsRlhf.answer: RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) is how modern AI systems learn to produce helpful, accurate responses. As an RLHF specialist, I provide the high-quality human feedback data that helps AI models understand nuance, context, and user intent—especially important for Nordic languages where training data is limited.

turnaround.question: What turnaround times can I expect?
turnaround.answer: Standard translation projects typically take 1-3 business days depending on volume. AI data operations projects are scoped individually based on complexity. I always provide realistic timelines upfront, and rush services are available for urgent needs.

industries.question: Which industries and sectors do you serve?
industries.answer: I work primarily with technology companies, AI/ML organizations, legal and financial services, healthcare, and public sector clients. My combination of AI expertise and linguistic qualifications makes me particularly valuable for organizations working at the intersection of technology and language.

confidentiality.question: How do you handle sensitive and confidential information?
confidentiality.answer: Confidentiality is foundational to my practice. I sign NDAs as standard, follow strict data security protocols, and handle all materials with professional discretion. Sensitive files are stored securely and deleted upon project completion per client requirements.

languages.question: Which language combinations do you support?
languages.answer: My core languages are Norwegian (native), Turkish (native), English (professional), Swedish (professional), and Danish (professional). I specialize in combinations across these languages for translation, localization, and interpretation services.

pricing.question: How do you structure pricing?
pricing.answer: Pricing depends on project type, complexity, language combination, and timeline. I offer hourly, project-based, and retainer models. After an initial conversation about your needs, I provide a clear, detailed quote with no hidden costs.

remote.question: Do you work with clients outside Norway?
remote.answer: Yes. While I'm based in Trondheim, I work with clients across the Nordics, Europe, and internationally. Remote collaboration is seamless, and I adjust availability for different time zones when needed.

ai.question: Do you use AI tools in your work?
ai.answer: I use AI tools strategically where they add value—but all deliverables receive human verification and quality assurance. For smaller languages like Norwegian, human oversight is essential because AI outputs often contain subtle errors that erode trust.
